title: Vis-CoT: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Interactive Visualization and Intervention in LLM Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
abstract: arXiv:2509.01412v3 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong reasoning via chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting, but the process is opaque, which makes verification, debugging, and control difficult in high-stakes settings. We present Vis-CoT, a human-in-the-loop framework that converts linear CoT text into an interactive reasoning graph. Users can visualize the logical flow, identify flawed steps, and intervene by pruning incorrect paths and grafting new, user-defined premises. This shifts interaction from passive observation to active collaboration, steering models toward more accurate and trustworthy conclusions. Across GSM8K and StrategyQA, Vis-CoT improves final-answer accuracy by up to 24 percentage points over non-interactive baselines. A user study also shows large gains in perceived usability and trust. Vis-CoT points to a practical path for more reliable, understandable, and collaborative reasoning by combining LLMs with targeted human oversight.

Title: Vis-CoT: A Human-in-the-Loop Framework for Interactive Visualization and Intervention in LLM Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
Abstract: arXiv:2509.01412v3 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show strong reasoning via chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting, but the process is opaque, which makes verification, debugging, and control difficult in high-stakes settings. We present Vis-CoT, a human-in-the-loop framework that converts linear CoT text into an interactive reasoning graph. Users can visualize the logical flow, identify flawed steps, and intervene by pruning incorrect paths and grafting new, user-defined premises. This shifts interaction from passive observation to active collaboration, steering models toward more accurate and trustworthy conclusions. Across GSM8K and StrategyQA, Vis-CoT improves final-answer accuracy by up to 24 percentage points over non-interactive baselines. A user study also shows large gains in perceived usability and trust. Vis-CoT points to a practical path for more reliable, understandable, and collaborative reasoning by combining LLMs with targeted human oversight.
translated_title: Vis-CoT：一种面向大语言模型链式思维推理中交互式可视化与干预的人机协同框架
translated_abstract: arXiv:2509.01412v3 公告类型：替换 摘要：大语言模型通过链式思维提示展现出强大的推理能力，但这一过程不透明，在高风险场景中使得验证、调试和控制变得困难。我们提出Vis-CoT，一种人机协同框架，它将线性的链式思维文本转化为交互式推理图。用户可以可视化逻辑流程，识别有缺陷的步骤，并通过剪除错误路径和嫁接用户自定义的新前提进行干预。这使交互从被动观察转变为主动协作，引导模型得出更准确、更可信的结论。在GSM8K和StrategyQA数据集上，Vis-CoT相较于非交互式基线将最终答案准确率提升了最多24个百分点。一项用户研究也显示，用户在感知可用性和信任度方面有显著提升。Vis-CoT通过将大语言模型与有针对性的人类监督相结合，为更可靠、可理解且协作性的推理提供了一条实用路径。
tldr: Vis-CoT通过将大语言模型的链式思维推理转化为交互式推理图，使人类能够可视化、验证并主动干预推理过程，从而显著提升答案准确性和用户信任度。
en_tdlr: Vis-CoT transforms LLM chain-of-thought reasoning into an interactive graph, enabling humans to visualize, verify, and actively intervene in the reasoning process, significantly improving answer accuracy and user trust.
